name: cad-spec-gen
description: CAD pipeline skill: design doc → design review → structured spec → 2D drawings → 3D renders → photorealistic images

skills.name: CAD Pipeline Assistant
skills.description: Natural-language assistant for the CAD rendering pipeline (16 intents: env check, config validation, next-step recommendation, materials, camera, exploded view, rendering, AI enhancement, troubleshooting, file structure, status, cross-model integration, BOM/parts, CAD spec, design review)

skills.name: CAD Spec Generator
skills.description: Extract 9 categories of structured data from design documents into CAD_SPEC.md. Supports --review mode: mechanical/assembly/material/completeness checks → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → user iterate or proceed → CAD_SPEC.md

skills.name: Gemini AI Enhancement
skills.description: Enhance Blender-rendered PNG to photorealistic JPG via Gemini AI (geometry locked, reskin only). 3 prompt templates for standard/exploded/orthographic views.

skills.name: Parametric Mechanical Design
skills.description: End-to-end parametric mechanical subsystem workflow: params.py → CadQuery 3D → GB/T 2D drawings → Blender rendering → AI enhancement. 6 phases with sub-command routing.

tools.name: cad_spec_gen
tools.description: Extract structured CAD spec from Markdown design documents

tools.name: bom_parser
tools.description: Parse BOM tables from design documents into tree/JSON/summary

tools.name: gemini_enhance
tools.description: Image-to-image AI enhancement: Blender PNG → photorealistic JPG (geometry locked)

tools.name: annotate_render
tools.description: Add component labels (CN/EN) to rendered images via PIL. Leader lines + text on semi-transparent background.

pipeline.overview: Design Doc (.md) → DESIGN_REVIEW.md → CAD_SPEC.md → CadQuery (STEP/DXF/GLB) → Blender Cycles PNG → Gemini AI JPG → Annotated JPG
stages: Parametric modeling (CadQuery): STEP + DXF (GB/T national standard) + GLB
3D rendering (Blender Cycles CPU): N-view PNG (default 5, configurable), 15 PBR material presets
AI enhancement (Gemini, optional): photorealistic JPG, geometry locked
Annotation (annotate_render.py, optional): component labels (CN/EN) via PIL
